templates.name: Do you gift wrap?
templates.content: While we do not offer gift wrap, we will gift bag your order in a premium branded gift bag.

templates.name: How do I redeem my gift card?
templates.content: Gift Cards may be redeemed at any participating Chico's location, by phone or online. To redeem online have your Gift Card out as you will need to input the card # and pin during the Payment page at Checkout. For additional information regarding the redemption of Gift Cards, please call 1-888-855-4986.

templates.name: How long will it take for my points to show on my account?
templates.content: Please allow three (3) business days from your in-store purchase or from the order shipment date for your Qualifying Purchase to be reflected in your total Qualifying Net Spend and for your Points to be posted to your account.

templates.name: How long will the store hold my order?
templates.content: We will happily hold your order for 4 days, starting the day your order was processed. If the items are not picked up in four days, we will cancel your order and remove the hold that was placed on your original method of payment so that you will not be charged for the order. If you need to hold your order longer that 4 days, and want to arrange a time extension, please contact the store selected for pick up.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at customerservice@chicos.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at customerservice@chicos.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1 business day and we usually ship via USPS. Once shipped, it will take 4-10 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at  888-855-4986 toll-free (Mon-Sun 7am - 1am ET) or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help! Would you mind sharing your usual size? I'd also recommend taking a look at the size chart available on each product page as well as the overall fit based on our user reviews.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $125. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.chicos.com/store/page/returns-info/36

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at  customerservice@chicos.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find a Boutique near you here: https://www.chicos.com/locations/

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here: https://www.chicos.com/store/page/chicos-rewards/261409277

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I'm afraid due to the quick processing time at our distribution center, we are unable to cancel or modify an order after it has been submitted. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/lovechicos and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/LoveChicos

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.chicos.com/store/sale

templates.name: Do you offer price adjustments?
templates.content: Yes, we do issue sale price adjustments. However, your order must have been placed no more than 14 days before the price change was made. Please have your invoice number ready and contact our Customer Service Department at 1-888-855-4986 to see if you are eligible for a price adjustment.

templates.name: I saw an item in one of your boutiques, but can't seem to find it on your website
templates.content: Merchandise selection on our website varies from our boutiques. Call us at 1-888-855-4986 and one of our sales associates would be happy to try to locate any item for you.

templates.name: Can someone else pick up my order in store?
templates.content:
Yes! You can pick up your order yourself or designate an alternate person to pick up your order. If someone else is going to pick up your order, you must designate them as your alternate person when placing your order. You will need to provide their name and email address. 

We will notify both of you with a "Ready for Pickup" email with instructions for picking up your order. Your pickup person will need a valid government issued ID, such as a driver's license or passport, and the order number or order confirmation email to pick up your items.

templates.name: Do you sell gift cards?
templates.content: We have both physical and E-Gift Cards. You can check them out here: https://www.chicos.com/store/page/chicos-gift-cards/114109276

templates.name: Do you ship to APO/FPO or PO Boxes?
templates.content: We do ship to military addresses and P.O. Boxes, however, we can only ship these items via Standard delivery. Please note that Standard delivery requires an additional three days of arrival time.

templates.name: Can my rewards be combined together or with other offers?
templates.content: Yes! Rewards can be combined with up to five (5) other Rewards and coupons in a single transaction provided the total value of your purchase (excluding taxes and shipping) exceeds the total value of all combined Rewards and coupons. Restrictions may apply, please see coupon offer details for further information.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content:
If you prefer to return or to exchange your purchase in one of our boutiques, our sales associates will be happy to help you with your return or exchange at any of our Chico's U.S. boutiques (excluding outlets). You can find a boutique near you here: https://www.chicos.com/locations

If you prefer to send your return by mail, please affix the Prepaid Return Shipping Label that we provided, along with your invoice, to the box and drop off your package in the U.S. mail. If you don't have a Prepaid Return Shipping Label, visit our Returns Portal where you can download and print a prepaid return shipping label: https://www.chicos.com/store/order/returns.jsp Please note that when we receive your return, we'll deduct $7 from your refund for handling fees.

templates.name: How long does it take to process the return?
templates.content: Please allow up to two weeks from the date you mail your item(s) back for your return to be processed-you will receive an email confirmation when complete.

templates.name: How do I select gift packaging?
templates.content: Simply select the gift bag option at step two in your shopping cart at checkout.

templates.name: How do I know if my order is available for same-day pickup in store?
templates.content: Any product that is eligible for pickup will have a highlighted pickup area near the "add to bag" button. All you have to do is select color, size and quantity, click the "pick up in store" button and then enter your zip code. We will show you all of the stores near you that have product availability. Save your store location by clicking "my store" and we will show you inventory status at your store as you continue to shop. If you are a registered user, we will save your store to your account settings.

templates.name: When should I come to the store to pick up my order?
templates.content: We will send you an email to let you know when it's time to pick up your order! When your order is ready for pick up, you will receive a "Ready for Pick-up" email. This email will provide your in-store location for pickup and instructions on what to bring.

templates.name: What do I need to bring to the store in order to pick up my items?
templates.content: You'll be required to bring a valid government issued ID, such as a driver's license or passport, and the order number or order confirmation email to pick up your items.

templates.name: I just received a reward. How do I redeem it?
templates.content:
For in store purchases, bring your Reward certificate with you when you visit any Chico's Boutique or Outlet and present it to your Stylist at checkout or show your Stylist the email containing your Reward when checking out.

For online purchases, locate your Reward code on your Reward certificate and enter it at checkout to redeem your Reward or click through the link in your Reward email; the Reward code will be automatically added to your shopping cart.

Please note that once a Reward certificate is redeemed, it cannot be reinstated or refunded, even if you return or exchange all or part of your purchase.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.chicos.com/store/common/order_lookup.jsp

templates.name: When will my order be ready for pick up in store?
templates.content: Orders are typically confirmed within the hour of placing the order. If an order confirmation email is not sent to you within an hour of placing the order, please call the store selected for pick up.

templates.name: How is my order gift packaged?
templates.content:
Gift packaging will include the following:

• Prices will be removed
• Items will be wrapped in tissue
• All items will be placed in one premium branded gift bag per order

templates.name: How long does it take to receive my refund?
templates.content: Once you receive your email indicating your return has been processed, you can expect to receive your credit in 5-7 business days.
